response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but the resume does not support a Principal/Director-level IC role focused on AI strategy. Total experience is roughly 13-15 years depending on how early freelance work is counted, with no demonstrated principal/staff-level strategic leadership at scale, no advanced degree, no recognized AI products or platforms, and minimal cloud-architect depth (AWS CDK mention only). The AI involvement is recent and infrastructure-adjacent rather than building differentiated AI products.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and community teaching/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
No Principal/Director-level IC or strategic advisory experience with customers and partners
Lacks advanced degree and deep cloud architecture credentials expected at this seniority

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
No principal-level strategic leadership track record
